scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "cross-env GRAPH_MODE=neo4j DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED=true SEED_DEMO_USERS=true npm run dev:backend" "cross-env VITE_DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED=true npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:no-local-auth: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:memory: npm run storage:clear && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "cross-env DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED=true SEED_DEMO_USERS=true npm run dev:backend" "cross-env VITE_DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED=true npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:production: cross-env NODE_ENV=production DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED=false SEED_DEMO_USERS=false VITE_DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED=false npm run build
